A '''H'nemthe'''<ref name="ccg" /> with [[Color/Legends|blue-gray]] skin was present in the [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|palace]] of the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. The [[H'nemthe (species)/Legends|H'nemthe]] stood in Jabba's throne room next to an [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] and the [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] [[Leslomy Tacema]] when the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] [[Siege of Jabba's Palace|arrived]] to rescue his friend [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], who was a [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]] of the Hutt. Skywalker was dropped into the pit of [[Jabba's rancor/Legends|Jabba's rancor]]; he killed the [[Rancor/Legends|beast]], however, and was dragged past the H'nemthe by several palace guards on his way to stand before Jabba and receive punishment.<ref name="rotj" />

==Behind the scenes==
The H'nemthe present in Jabba's Palace is briefly visible in a background shot of [[Richard Marquand]]'s [[1983]] film [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']].<ref name="rotj" /> The character's mask was recycled from the set of the [[1977]] film [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'']], where it was originally used as the head of [[M'iiyoom Onith/Legends|M'iiyoom Onith]] in the [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Mos Eisley Cantina]] scene.<ref name="shedding">{{SWArchive|url=episode-iv/bts/article/f20030502/index.html|text=Cantina Roll-Call: Shedding Light on Some Alien Aliases|int=Cantina Roll-Call: Shedding Light on Some Alien Aliases}}</ref>

The palace scenes, which featured the H'nemthe character, were filmed between [[January 25]] and [[February 8]], [[1982]] on Stage 8 at [[Elstree Studios]].<ref name="Making of">''[[The Making of Return of the Jedi]]''</ref> A [[Human/Legends|Human]] character was also present on set, wearing an exact duplicate of the H'nemthe's costume with the exception of a black helmet replacing the H'nemthe mask.<ref name="TatooineManhunt">''[[Tatooine Manhunt]]''</ref>
